hooks.name: Sync Host Venv Reminder
hooks.description: Reminds you to run ./bin/create-host-venv.sh when requirements.txt is modified, so the host .venv stays in sync for IDE analysis.

action.prompt: The requirements.txt file was just modified. Remind the user to run ./bin/create-host-venv.sh to keep their host .venv in sync for IDE analysis.
